title: ilyphilos triandrus
intro: Ilyphilos triandrus, also known as the Three-Flowered Milkwort, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. Ilyphilos triandrus has been traditionally used to treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal benefits.
